title: MCreative Cosmetics
description: Cosmetics made for the MCreative SMP
body:
# MCreative Cosmetics
This resource pack was made to be used with [Custom Cosmetics](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-cosmetics) on the [MCreative SMP](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mcreative-smp)  
Content will be added to match that of the SMP
## Additions  
- **Hats** : Waffle, Corruption, Glowroot Horns, Brown Hat
- **Belts** : Red, Blue, Purple Balls
  
## How to Add  
This Resourcepack includes configdata.txt
open it up and copy the included data into your servers cosmetics config, located at gamedir/core/cosmetics
